title: NormalizedArticleResponse
description: Normalized response returned by MCP Wrapper tools (search_news, search_company_news). This is the contract between MCP Wrapper and Agent Orchestrator.

articles.description: List of normalized news articles returned by the search.

query.description: The search query that was executed (may differ slightly from input after normalization).

total_results.description: Total number of results available (may be more than returned in articles array).

cached.description: True if this response was served from cache, false if it required a live SerpApi call.

request_id.description: UUID correlation ID for this MCP tool call, used for traceability.

title.description: Article title, with HTML entities decoded.

published_date.description: Publication date in ISO 8601 UTC format. Relative dates from SerpApi (e.g., '2 hours ago') are converted to absolute timestamps.

snippet.description: Short excerpt from the article, with HTML entities decoded.

thumbnail_url.description: URL of article thumbnail image if available, null otherwise.

articles.title: Walmart Connect Expands Self-Serve Advertising Platform
articles.snippet: Walmart Connect announced a major expansion of its self-serve advertising tools, making it easier for mid-market brands to purchase media directly.
